LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER CAROL TORRES' MOTION TO SET HEARING ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE PURSUANT TO CCP 1094.5 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. THE PARTIES FAILED TO COMPLY WITH THE TENTATIVE RULING DIRECTIONS TO MEET AND CONFER TO AGREE ON A BRIEFING AND HEARING SCHEDULE. MOVING PARTY MAY FILE A NOTICE OF HEARING. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-20-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is Off calendar per moving party. Parties have reached a settlement. Judge: Curtis E. A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

(Amended) Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Set Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate And Pos
Off Calendar Jun-28-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Sachi A. Clements, Esq., of Law Office of Mark Zanobini, Tel. 415.392.8400, appearing for Petitioner and moving party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER CAROL TORRES' (Amended) Motion To Set Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate - The parties may select any court day they wish for the petition to be heard. The parties are reminded to provide courtesy copies of all papers filed in support of and in opposition to the petition well in advance of the hearing. Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976

Notice And Motion To Set Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate Putsuant To Ccp 1094.5
Off Calendar Jun-14-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.
PETITIONER CAROL TORRES Notice And Motion To Set Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate Pursuant To Ccp 1094.5 is taken off calendar. The parties failed to comply with the tentative ruling directions to meet and confer to agree on a briefing and hearing schedule.
Moving party may file a notice of hearing. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.
